title: What was promised in 2024 (before they took it down)
subtitle: Verbatim policy commitments from donaldjtrump.com and the 2024 Republican Party Platform, preserved before the live pages were removed.
methodology: Each commitment is quoted verbatim from a preserved snapshot of donaldjtrump.com (via the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine) or from the 2024 Republican National Convention platform PDF (adopted July 15, 2024 and still publicly hosted at gop.com as of capture). The live policy pages on donaldjtrump.com were removed by January 20, 2025, when the domain converted to a donation-only landing page. The per-page Wayback capture date is recorded as captured_date. We do not log the exact removal date of each page; we use a canonical deleted_after of 2025-01-20 for the donaldjtrump.com pages. The RNC platform PDF remains live and is marked deleted_after=null. Outcome grading is intentionally minimal. This chapter preserves what was promised. Real-time grading of the second term lives at campaignreceipts.com/trump.
deleted_after_note: The live policy pages were removed from donaldjtrump.com in early 2025 following the election; the exact removal date per page is not publicly logged. The domain now serves only a donation page.

commitments.verbatim_quote: Seal the border and stop the migrant invasion
commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again
commitments.outcome_notes: Day-one EO 14165 'Securing Our Borders' signed January 20, 2025, ended catch-and-release and reinstated Remain in Mexico. Source: federalregister.gov/documents/2025/01/30/2025-02014/securing-our-borders

commitments.verbatim_quote: Carry out the largest deportation operation in american history
commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again
commitments.outcome_notes: Day-one EO 14159 'Protecting the American People Against Invasion' (Jan 20, 2025) and EO 14157 designating cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations initiated mass interior enforcement. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/protecting-the-american-people-against-invasion/

commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14154 'Unleashing American Energy' signed January 20, 2025, revoking Biden-era climate orders and opening federal lands. Source: federalregister.gov/documents/2025/01/29/2025-01956/unleashing-american-energy

commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again

commitments.verbatim_quote: Keep men out of women's sports
commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14201 'Keeping Men Out of Women's Sports' signed February 5, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/02/keeping-men-out-of-womens-sports/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Deport pro-hamas radicals and make our college campuses safe and patriotic again
commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14188 'Additional Measures to Combat Anti-Semitism' (Jan 29, 2025) directed deportation of noncitizen campus protesters. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/additional-measures-to-combat-anti-semitism/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Secure our elections, including same day voting, voter identification, paper ballots, and proof of citizenship

commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14248 'Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections' signed March 25, 2025, directing proof-of-citizenship for federal voter registration. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/03/preserving-and-protecting-the-integrity-of-american-elections/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Unite our country by bringing it to new and record levels of success
commitments.source_section: 20 Core Promises to Make America Great Again
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will implement a 4-year national reshoring plan so that the United States no longer needs to rely on China for essential medical and national security goods, and ban Chinese ownership of all critical infrastructure in the United States.
commitments.source_section: Fair Trade for the American Worker
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will unleash the production of domestic energy resources, reduce the soaring price of gasoline, diesel and natural gas, promote energy security for our friends around the world, eliminate the socialist Green New Deal and ensure the United States is never again at the mercy of a foreign supplier of energy.
commitments.source_section: Unleash Energy Dominance
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14154 'Unleashing American Energy' signed Jan 20, 2025, revoked Biden climate orders. Source: federalregister.gov/documents/2025/01/29/2025-01956/unleashing-american-energy

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will shut down the Harris-Biden Administration's border disaster. He will again end catch-and-release, restore Remain in Mexico, and eliminate asylum fraud.
commitments.source_section: Secure Borders and Reclaim National Sovereignty
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14165 'Securing Our Borders' (Jan 20, 2025) ended catch-and-release and reinstated the Migrant Protection Protocols ('Remain in Mexico'). Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/securing-our-borders/

commitments.verbatim_quote: In cooperative states, President Trump will deputize the National Guard and local law enforcement to assist with rapidly removing illegal alien gang members and criminals. He will also deliver a merit-based immigration system that protects American labor and promotes American values.
commitments.source_section: Secure Borders and Reclaim National Sovereignty
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will take down the drug cartels just as he took down ISIS. He will impose a total naval embargo on cartels, order the Department of Defense to inflict maximum damage on cartel leadership and operations, designate cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations, and choke off their access to the global financial system.
commitments.source_section: War on the Drug Cartels
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14157 designated cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations (Jan 20, 2025). Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/designating-cartels-and-other-organizations-as-foreign-terrorist-organizations/

commitments.verbatim_quote: He will ask Congress to ensure that drug smugglers and traffickers can receive the Death Penalty.
commitments.source_section: War on the Drug Cartels
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: He will deliver record funding to hire and retrain police officers, strengthen qualified immunity and other protections for police officers, increase penalties for assaults on law enforcement, put violent offenders and career criminals behind bars, and surge federal prosecutors and the National Guard into high-crime communities.
commitments.source_section: Stop Crime and Restore Safety
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will defend America against all threats, protect America against all dangers, and keep America out of unnecessary foreign wars. He will also get the Harris-Biden Administration's radical left ideology out of our military and rehire every patriot who was unjustly fired.
commitments.source_section: Renew American Strength and Leadership
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14184 'Reinstating Service Members Discharged Under the Military's COVID-19 Vaccination Mandate' signed January 27, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/reinstating-service-members-discharged-under-the-militarys-covid-19-vaccination-mandate/

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will cut federal funding for any school or program pushing Critical Race Theory or gender ideology on our children. His administration will open Civil Rights investigations into any school district that has engaged in race-based discrimination.
commitments.source_section: Protect Parents' Rights
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14190 'Ending Radical Indoctrination in K-12 Schooling' (Jan 29, 2025). Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/ending-radical-indoctrination-in-k-12-schooling/

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will reward states and school districts that abolish teacher tenure for grades K-12 and adopt Merit Pay, cut the number of school administrators, adopt a Parental Bill of Rights, and implement the direct election of school principals by the parents.
commitments.source_section: Protect Parents' Rights
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: As part of my plan to secure the border, on Day One of my new term in office, I will sign an executive order making clear to federal agencies that under the correct interpretation of the law, going forward, the future children of illegal aliens will not receive automatic U.S. citizenship.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Day One Executive Order Ending Citizenship for Children of Illegals
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14160 'Protecting the Meaning and Value of American Citizenship' signed January 20, 2025; multiple federal courts issued preliminary injunctions blocking enforcement; consolidated appeals pending. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/protecting-the-meaning-and-value-of-american-citizenship/

commitments.verbatim_quote: It will be the official policy of the United States to take down the drug cartels just as we took down ISIS.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: President Donald J. Trump Declares War on Cartels
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14157 designating cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations signed Jan 20, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/designating-cartels-and-other-organizations-as-foreign-terrorist-organizations/

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will make it a personal mission to totally eradicate Veterans' homelessness in America.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Ending Veteran Homelessness in America
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump will end welfare for illegal aliens and defend the wealth of hardworking American families.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: No Welfare for Illegal Aliens
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Trump announces a plan to revolutionize higher education by shifting excessively large endowments from private universities toward a new institution called the American Academy.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: The American Academy
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: America Must Have the #1 Lowest Cost Energy and Electricity on Earth.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: America Must Have the #1 Lowest Cost Energy
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: As part of my plan to obtain total independence from China, we will phase in tariffs and import restrictions to bring back production of all essential medicines to the United States of America where they belong. I signed an executive order to begin this process in 2020 but Biden has shamefully failed to follow through.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Returning Production of Essential Medicines Back to America
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: President Donald J. Trump pledged to end the scourge of human trafficking and defend the dignity of human life.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: President Trump Calls for Death Penalty for Human Traffickers
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: This ridiculous Green New Deal crusade is causing car prices to skyrocket while setting the stage for the destruction of American auto production.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Rescuing America's Auto Industry
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14154 revoked the EV mandate (Jan 20, 2025). Source: federalregister.gov/documents/2025/01/29/2025-01956/unleashing-american-energy

commitments.verbatim_quote: Under the Trump Reciprocal Trade Act, other countries will have two choices — they'll get rid of their tariffs on us, or they will pay us hundreds of billions of dollars, and the United States will make an absolute FORTUNE.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Cementing Fair and Reciprocal Trade
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14257 'Regulating Imports With a Reciprocal Tariff to Rectify Trade Practices That Contribute to Large and Persistent Annual United States Goods Trade Deficits' signed April 2, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/04/regulating-imports-with-a-reciprocal-tariff-to-rectify-trade-practices/

commitments.verbatim_quote: I will use the president's long-recognized Impoundment Power to squeeze the bloated federal bureaucracy for massive savings. This will be in the form of tax reductions for you. This will help quickly to stop inflation and slash the deficit.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Using Impoundment to Cut Waste
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: No longer will unelected members of the Washington Swamp be allowed to act as the fourth branch of our Republic.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Liberating America from Biden's Regulatory Onslaught
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14171 'Restoring Accountability To Policy-Influencing Positions Within the Federal Workforce' (Schedule F) signed January 20, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/restoring-accountability-to-policy-influencing-positions-within-the-federal-workforce/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Three years from now, the United States will celebrate the biggest and most important milestone in our country's history — 250 years of American Independence. That's why as a nation, we should be preparing for the most spectacular birthday party. We want to make it the best of all time.
commitments.source_section: Agenda47: Celebration Of 250 Years Of American Independence
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: Republicans will support baseline Tariffs on Foreign-made goods, pass the Trump Reciprocal Trade Act, and respond to unfair Trading practices. As Tariffs on Foreign Producers go up, Taxes on American Workers, Families, and Businesses can come down.
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 2: Bring Back the American Dream
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14257 'Reciprocal Tariff' signed April 2, 2025 imposing universal baseline tariff; further escalations announced. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/04/regulating-imports-with-a-reciprocal-tariff-to-rectify-trade-practices/

commitments.verbatim_quote: We will use existing Federal Law to return Criminal Aliens to their Countries of Origin... Republicans will reverse Biden's Open Borders Policies, secure the Border, and stop the Migrant Invasion... we will carry out the largest Deportation Operation in American History.
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 1: Defeat Inflation and Quickly Bring Down All Prices
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14159 'Protecting the American People Against Invasion' signed Jan 20, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/protecting-the-american-people-against-invasion/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Republicans believe families should be empowered to choose the best Education for their children. We support Universal School Choice in every State in America.
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 9: Cultivate Great K-12 Schools
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump.

commitments.verbatim_quote: We will close the Department of Education and send it back to the States, where it belongs, and only send Money back to States that do an exemplary Job in Education.
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 9
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14242 'Improving Education Outcomes by Empowering Parents, States, and Communities' signed March 20, 2025, directing the Secretary of Education to take all necessary steps to facilitate the closure of the Department. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/03/improving-education-outcomes-by-empowering-parents-states-and-communities/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Republicans will end the Weaponization of the Federal Government, restore Free Speech in America, and stop Government Censorship of American Speech. We will also stop Critical Race Theory and other Racial discrimination disguised as Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI).
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 10
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14151 'Ending Radical and Wasteful Government DEI Programs and Preferencing' signed January 20, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/ending-radical-and-wasteful-government-dei-programs-and-preferencing/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Republicans will end the weaponized Government Persecution of the J6 Hostages.
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 10
commitments.outcome_notes: Proclamation 'Granting Pardons and Commutation of Sentences for Certain Offenses Relating to the Events at or Near the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021' signed January 20, 2025, pardoning ~1,500 J6 defendants. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/granting-pardons-and-commutation-of-sentences-for-certain-offenses-relating-to-the-events-at-or-near-the-united-states-capitol-on-january-6-2021/

commitments.verbatim_quote: We will Drill, Baby, Drill, and become Energy Independent, and even Dominant again. The United States has more liquid gold under our feet than any other Nation.
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 1
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14154 'Unleashing American Energy' and EO 14156 'Declaring a National Energy Emergency' signed Jan 20, 2025. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/declaring-a-national-energy-emergency/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Republicans will... cancel the Socialist Green New Deal, and rescind all Funds not yet spent under the grossly misnamed 'Inflation Reduction Act.'
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 4
commitments.outcome_notes: EO 14162 'Putting America First in International Environmental Agreements' (Jan 20, 2025) withdrew the U.S. from the Paris Agreement. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/putting-america-first-in-international-environmental-agreements/

commitments.verbatim_quote: Republicans will restore Healthcare Freedom, and... will protect Innocent Life, while also protecting IVF, contraception, and prenatal care.
commitments.source_section: 2024 GOP Platform — Chapter 7
commitments.outcome_notes: Outcome grading deferred to campaignreceipts.com/trump. Note: separate EO 14155 (Jan 20, 2025) withdrew the U.S. from the World Health Organization. Source: whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/withdrawing-the-united-states-from-the-world-health-organization/
